overall.description: Space flight simulation gameplay featuring first-person cockpit navigation through a dense asteroid field approaching a derelict station, transitioning to third-person view of the spacecraft flying past a massive planet and bright star. High-fidelity game engine rendering with sci-fi aesthetic and dynamic space lighting.

prominent large asteroid with rough surface texture

segments.scene_description: First-person cockpit view navigating through a dense asteroid field. The spacecraft HUD displays targeting and navigation data while the pilot approaches a derelict industrial station structure ahead. Large asteroids drift past on the left side as the ship maintains steady forward thrust through the debris field.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field near planetary bodies

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person cockpit interior to third-person view behind the spacecraft

agents.ego_description: spacecraft flying through dense asteroid field with large planet visible on right and bright star directly ahead

entered.detail: massive gray planetary body with cratered surface dominating the right side of the frame
intense white stellar light source creating lens flare and backlighting the scene
smaller reddish planetary body visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: External third-person view shows the spacecraft from behind as it navigates through a dense asteroid belt. A massive gray planet dominates the right side while a bright star shines intensely ahead. A smaller reddish planet appears on the left as the ship continues its journey through the debris field, with asteroids scattering in all directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from an intimate first-person cockpit perspective navigating a debris field into an expansive third-person view of a spacecraft journeying through a celestial system. It begins inside the cockpit, where a HUD displays navigation data as the ship pushes through a dense asteroid field toward a derelict industrial station. As the vessel maintains its forward thrust, the camera seamlessly shifts to an external position behind the spacecraft, revealing the vast scale of the surrounding asteroid belt. The scene then opens up to a cosmic vista, with a massive gray planet dominating the right side and a smaller reddish planet appearing on the left. Finally, the ship continues its trajectory through the scattering debris, heading toward the intense light of a bright star shining ahead.
